prompt: I'm getting 'No loader found for resource' when calling load_sprite to load my player sprite. The PNG file exists at assets/sprites/player/idle.png in my project folder. What's going wrong?

assertions.text: Identifies headless import as the root cause (not just one of many)
Provides exact fix command with --path flag: godot --headless --path <project> --import
Explains WHY it happens (Godot resource system / .import sidecar files)
Mentions that this applies to ALL new assets, not just first time
